subject: Lasswell, a young male warrior in layered purple-dark armor with long dark hair, standing in a composed pose with a sword at his side
description: A young male figure stands in a composed, slightly confrontational stance. He wears layered armor in deep purple, dark leather, and muted brown — pauldrons, belted vest, and high-collared coat. His long dark hair falls loosely to his shoulders. A sword hilt is visible at his hip, blade pointing downward. The background shows a large soft-focus portrait of the same figure, a common FFTCG dual-image composition. The overall color palette is cool blue-purple with dark shadows. His expression is composed and serious — neither raging nor relaxed.
foreground: young male figure in purple-dark layered armor, long dark hair, sword at hip, serious expression
background: soft-focus large portrait of same figure, blue-grey tones
emotion: composed, serious, guarded — controlled resolve with a hint of melancholy
